gigapan.description:
This is the exhibit M.P.C.A.P.G
Modern Painting Commercial Art Post Graffiti by the artist PERFEKT WORLD.

INOPERAbLe also put out a map to Viennese urban life.  An attempt at a psychogeography.

I was referred to them from someone in the Museumsquartier, and I went in and got two images.

Burggasse 24, 1070 Wien, Austria
